regime_hint.notes: Strong gap-up day. SGX Nifty 24,550 (+1.45%) on US-Iran peace-deal hopes. US: SPX +1.5% (7,365), Nasdaq +2.0% (25,839). Asia: Nikkei +5.4% to ATH 62,720, Hang Seng +1.21%. NIFTY closed 24,330.95 (+1.24%) yesterday. Daily regime tag is RANGING, ATR 1.47%, vol LOW; cross-asset cues all point TRENDING_UP into the open. DII bought Rs 6,837 cr May 6 vs FII -Rs 5,835 cr (net +Rs 1,002 cr). Crude rebounding modestly to $101.6 (+0.36%) is a marginal headwind for energy importers. India VIX API still down. Expect bot to upgrade to STRONG_TREND_UP early.

watchlist.notes: Scanner #1 (2.32). At 52-week high; Nifty Pharma at fresh 52w high. Organon $11.75B deal still headline-active (post-acq net debt/EBITDA ~2.3x). Q4 results May 21 — outside binary window. Gap +0.89%. Trade either side on 2+ confirmations.

Scanner #5 (2.07). Carry from May 6 (no entry triggered). LEO-satellite venture vs Starlink — long-term positive headline. Q4 profit -12.55% YoY is the offsetting drag. Gap -0.04%. MarketsMOJO upgraded Sell→Hold. Invalidate if opens below VWAP and holds through 09:45.

Strongest single-name catalyst today: RBI approved (May 6) HDFC Bank group entities holding up to 9.95% in ICICIBANK + KOTAKBANK. Legal review cleared CEO reappointment overhang. Stock surged 3%+ May 6. Gap +0.37%. Banking exposure capped to max_open_positions=2.
IT tailwind from Nasdaq +2%. USD/INR weak. Gemini flags broader IT-sector weakness on May 5; no fresh catalyst. Gap +0.76%. ORB break in either direction with 2+ confirmations.
Outperformed banking sector +3.2% on May 6, approaching 20-DMA resistance. Weekly -3.71% tempers conviction. No event. Gap +1.21%. Counts toward 2-position banking cap with HDFCBANK / ICICIBANK.

Mixed: HDFCBANK stake-acquisition headline is a positive overhang for ICICIBANK demand, but stock fell 1.21% May 5 and SEBI admin warning (May 4) lingers. Gap +0.86%. Lower conviction; 2+ confirmations required.
HARD BLOCK — Q4 results + dividend tomorrow (May 8). Binary event in <24h. #lesson 2026-04-30 applied (ADANIENT binary event was traded despite pre-market flag — must hard-block, not flag).
HARD BLOCK — Q4 results May 12 (5 days). Yesterday's long bias blocked 13 profitable SELL signals; stock was below VWAP all day (#lesson 2026-05-06). Drop entirely until post-results.

rationale: Gap-up day with broad global risk-on (US-Iran peace hopes). 6 tradeable + 2 hard-blocks (SBIN binary tomorrow, TATAPOWER binary in 5 days plus failed long bias yesterday). Risk caps held at yesterday's level (5 / 1.0% / 2) — partial-exit bug in order_manager.py remains unfixed, so banking exposure intentionally capped via max_open_positions=2. ORB is the primary setup on a gap-up day. Strongest single-name catalyst is HDFCBANK (RBI stake approval + legal overhang lifted). Pharma sector at fresh 52w highs gives SUNPHARMA both-direction tradeability. RELIANCE carried from yesterday (no entry generated). Every entry must clear the MIN_CONFIRMATIONS gate (now in code per d2a2908).
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-05-06: TATAPOWER long bias blocked 13 profitable SELL signals — applied as hard avoid (results May 12 also bars re-entry).
#lesson 2026-05-06: Partial qty EOD square-off bug unresolved — keeping max_open_positions=2 to limit unexited capital exposure.
#lesson 2026-05-05: PNB outside NIFTY 50 universe — excluded along with PNB/BANKBARODA/SAIL/DLF/ETERNAL/INDUSINDBK/ADANIENT.
#lesson 2026-04-30: Binary-event stocks must be hard-blocked, not just flagged — applied to SBIN (May 8) and TATAPOWER (May 12). BPCL (May 12) excluded from watchlist for the same reason.
#lesson 2026-W18 (promoted): Documenting a rule is not enforcing it — every entry must hit the MIN_CONFIRMATIONS gate added in d2a2908.
